claim_boundary: This is the canonical public curation index for HeliX. Public wording must stay bounded by each entry's falsifier and threat_model_scope.

buckets.description: Strongest local mechanics and trust claims.

entries.falsifier: Signed receipt tamper is accepted, checkpoint verification fails silently, quarantine no longer isolates non-canonical branches, or exported local proofs stop verifying.
entries.threat_model_scope: Local workspace trust only; excludes global transparency logs, semantic truth, and hidden provider identity.
entries.public_note: Canonical public entry for local core trust: signed receipts, local signed head checkpoints, canonical head, and quarantine.

entries.falsifier: The forged-vs-legitimate split no longer holds, recall falls below the documented threshold, or false positives exceed the documented bound.
entries.threat_model_scope: Local fixture/mechanics claim; excludes compromised production keys and adaptive attack coverage unless explicitly modeled.
entries.public_note: Strongest paper-friendly lane: valid chain does not imply authentic lineage.

entries.falsifier: Bounded retrieval or context construction no longer holds under the documented depth/budget settings.
entries.threat_model_scope: Bounded-context mechanics only. Not literal infinite memory and not a universal latency claim.
entries.public_note: Bounded context under deep stores, not literal infinite memory.

buckets.description: Narrow real-world observations preserved for auditability.

entries.falsifier: The cited probes no longer show requested_model vs actual_model mismatch, or the replay trail breaks.
entries.threat_model_scope: Provider-returned metadata only; excludes intent and hidden identity claims.
entries.public_note: Three observed requested-vs-returned model mismatches preserved with digests, latency and lineage.

buckets.description: Supportive or exploratory lanes kept with explicit claim boundaries.

entries.falsifier: The adjudicated arm no longer separates contaminated vs safe behavior under the fixture conditions.
entries.threat_model_scope: Preregistered local fixture only; not a broad cloud-memory quality claim.
entries.public_note: Supportive contamination methodology artifact, not a universal benchmark.

entries.falsifier: The cited live run no longer shows the recorded memory-on win or the overhead bound ceases to hold in that setup.
entries.threat_model_scope: Single live run with network-latency denominator; not a universal memory benchmark.
entries.public_note: Supportive live result only. Keep out of broad benchmark claims until replicated.

entries.falsifier: A stale-parent branch is lost, both branches enter default context, the canonical head is overwritten by stale lineage, or Gamma merges without citing both branch hashes.
entries.threat_model_scope: Local single-workspace stale-parent race methodology only; not distributed consensus, semantic truth, hidden provider identity, or production multi-node locking.
entries.public_note: Bounded methodology lane for concurrent agent work preserved as deterministic evidence with canonical-head survival and quarantine.

buckets.description: Product-ish or showcase evidence kept with bounded wording.

entries.falsifier: The documented backtest or downgrade behavior no longer holds under the fixture conditions.
entries.threat_model_scope: Product/demo fixture only; does not prove general zero-day prediction.
entries.public_note: Kept as a bounded product-oriented demonstration.

buckets.description: Failed, blocked or falsification-preserved lanes kept visible.

entries.falsifier: The current local suite becomes green again with non-zero context_hit_count across the seeded trials.
entries.threat_model_scope: Current local regression lane; historical artifacts do not override current failed suite behavior.
entries.public_note: Visible null result. Do not cite as a green memory win.

entries.falsifier: The current local suite becomes green again with non-zero context_hit_count and a passing seeded run.
entries.threat_model_scope: Current local regression lane; do not substitute old artifacts for present status.
entries.public_note: Visible null result. Current local suite is red.

entries.falsifier: The raw contaminated path stops being a useful failure case and no longer demonstrates the need for adjudication.
entries.threat_model_scope: Experimental continuity/contamination lane; methodology evidence only.
entries.public_note: Failure-preserved continuity lane showing why adjudication matters.

entries.falsifier: The blocked status is only lifted when the required power and external support conditions are explicitly met.
entries.threat_model_scope: Guardrail only; no public hidden-identity claim.
entries.public_note: Methodology guardrail preserved to stop overclaiming.
